Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance

DEFT'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED
/CAL: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X: APPEARING FOR SFPD LEGAL IS RONNIE WAGNER,/MO GRTD/X: SEE SIGNED ORDER,/X:ORDER WAS SUBMITTED TOTHE COURT FOR SIGNATURE AND FILING,/

/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 37D/CTS:37/VF2:150/CCC:COUNTS 1,2,3,10,11,12/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/WS/X:HARVEY WAIVER AS TO RESTITUTION AND STAY AWAY ORDERS FROM TERMINATED PROBATIONS IN COURT NOS, #18008581 AND #19007322/SA2:(STAY OUT AS TO ALL) 1)SAKS FIFTH AVENUEA, 2) NORTHFACEF, CA,4)NORDSTROMSTREETS, SF, CA, 6) SHERATON HOTEL/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL/LDTR:06-17-19/TE:2 WEEKS/MO PC 17B/MO GRTD/X:COUNTS 1,2,3, 11, AND 12 ARE REDUCED TO MISDEMEANORS/IRR/FAW/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVSCONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1,2,3,11,12,13/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 06-17-19/987,2/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:CERTIFIED LAW CLERK CASS MAGLIOZZI PRESENT UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF ALEEM RAJA/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN: JONATHAN YOUNG/WIT SWORN: DREW JACKSON/EXHMA:P1 CD 190151652 VIDEO/EXHMA:P2 COPY OF NORTHFACE RECEIPT/EXHMA:P3-P9 PACKET OF COPIES OF PHOTOS/X:COURT GRANTS PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DISMISS COUNT 4 ONLY PC1385 INTEREST OF JUSTICE/HTA1:1,2,3,12,13/X:ALL ALLEGATIONS FOUND TRUE/X:COUNTS 5,6,7,8,9,10,11 ARECERTIFIED TO SUPERIOR COURT AS MISDEMEANORS/X:DEFENDANT REMAINS RELEASED ONACM/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD: ARRAIGNMENT/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:CAD IS RELEASED TO DEFENSE COUNSEL,/DEF:WAS LATE TO COURT, EARLIER BWI AND BAIL FORFEITURE ARE SET ASIDE/VD:LAST DAY OF03-19-19/CONT/DOP/X:LOVE WAIVER/

/CAL: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/ACM/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO PARTICIPATE IN SUBSTANCE ABUSE GROUPS, PARTICIPATE IN JOB TRAINING SERVICES AND REPORT TO ACM 5TIMES PER WEEK IN PERSON/SA4: SAKS FIFTH AVENUE AT 384 POST STREET, THE NORTH FACE ON 180 POST STREET, AND SABABA RESTAURANT ON 554 COMMERCIAL STREET IN SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD/LD: 03-19-19/X: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 03-18-19 IS CONFIRMED/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 03-19-19/987,2/BAIL: 25000/X: BAIL SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:DEFENSE'S MOTION FOR ACM IN-CUSTODY REFERRAL IS GRANTED/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 03-12-19/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON03-18-19/DOP/
